name: Diode Comp
explanation: A diode-bridge style bus compressor with a smooth, slightly coloured character. A stereo-linked peak/RMS detector feeds a dB-domain gain computer with a wide over-easy soft knee; Attack and Release shape the gain-reduction envelope. The signal passes through a gentle asymmetric diode-bridge transfer that adds a touch of even-harmonic warmth, so loud material is squeezed and coloured more than quiet passages for a classy, glued sound. Controls: Threshold, Ratio, Attack, Release and Makeup.
